message:
fix(crypto): chain root-cause errors at key_management.rs crypto sites [coding_agent_session_search-htiim]

Closes htiim (b64fe follow-up). Mirrors the encrypt.rs fix landed in
0b81b601: 7 .map_err(|_| ...) sites in src/pages/key_management.rs
dropped the underlying error type; post-fix every site preserves the
source in the chain AND surfaces actionable diagnostics.

What landed:
- L288 (rotate path: old export_id length): chains TryFromSliceError +
  actual length.
- L475 (derive_kek_hkdf KEK length check): captures actual_len BEFORE
  try_into consumes the Vec; updates the upstream hkdf_extract_expand
  map_err to include "HKDF extract+expand failed for recovery secret
  KEK: {e}" call-site context (matches encrypt.rs).
- L491 (unwrap_key nonce length): captures actual_nonce_len + chains
  TryFromSliceError.
- L506 (unwrap_key AES-GCM decrypt): chains aead error + slot id +
  wrapped/nonce/aad lengths. Comment explains the slot id correlates
  with the recovery / password slot the operator was attempting and
  notes aead's Display deliberately stays opaque about MAC vs auth-tag
  verification (timing-attack hardening).
- L509 (unwrap_key DEK length): captures dek_len before try_into +
  surfaces "expected 32, got N".
- L618 (decrypt_all_chunks base_nonce length): chains
  TryFromSliceError + actual length.
- L625 (decrypt_all_chunks export_id length): chains
  TryFromSliceError + actual length.
- L705 (decrypt_all_chunks chunk decrypt): chains aead error + chunk
  index + ciphertext length.

Two new regression gates (mirrors of encrypt.rs gates from 0b81b601):
- unwrap_key_chains_aead_source_error_into_diagnostic_message: builds
  a real wrapped DEK with aes_gcm directly, tampers the auth tag,
  asserts unwrap_key error contains slot id + wrapped length + nonce
  length + ":" source-separator + legacy "Key unwrapping failed"
  prefix (so existing operator runbooks / grep patterns still match).
- derive_kek_hkdf_error_message_pins_actual_kek_length: codifies the
  expected message shape ("expected 32, got N") so a future refactor
  that drops actual_len fails the assertion.

28/28 lib pages::key_management tests green via
rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/rch_target_cass_p2 cargo test
--lib pages::key_management.

Note on file-domain restriction: src/pages/key_management.rs was on
this pane's do-not-touch list per initial marching orders. The user
explicitly invoked RULE 0 override directing this pane to ship htiim
(see /loop directive at 04:36 UTC). All other pane domain rules
remain in force.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
